name: FDXClientHandleUdp
title: FDXClientHandleUdp
syntax: long FDXClientHandleUdp(dword ipv4Address, dword port); // form 1
long FDXClientHandleUdp(byte ipv6Address[], dword port); // form 2
description: This function creates an FDX client handle for the FDX client with the specified address.
Prerequisite for the function is to configure UPD/IPv4 or UDP/IPv6 as transport layer for the FDX feature.

parameters.name: ipv4Address
parameters.description: IPv4 address of the FDX clients

parameters.name: ipv6Address
parameters.description: IPv6 address of the FDX clients

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: UPD port number of the FDX clients.

return: If successful, the function returns a value greater than 0, which means the FDX client handle. Values smaller than or equal to zero indicate an error.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
